# Legacy de-SUT term list — regression fixture (CHARTER A1 / ADR-BUGATE-004).
#
# This is the FULL hard-coded FORBIDDEN list that lived in
# scripts/check_no_sut_terms.py before the term list was profile-ized. It is
# kept as a fixture for one purpose: upstream CI runs the guard with this file
# (--terms-file) so the ORIGIN SUT's identity can never seep back into the
# reusable core tree. The origin SUT's terms exist only here and in that SUT's
# own profile — never in engine source.
#
# Two sections:
#   - ACTIVE (uncommented): identity terms of the origin SUT — product name,
#     internal system names, product API identifiers, account/person handles,
#     origin memory namespace. These stay a hard regression line.
#   - RETIRED (commented): industry/domain vocabulary de-listed by CHARTER A1
#     layer 3 (API-doc tool names, chain names, cryptography terms, generic
#     industry words). Core no longer defends them; a SUT profile that wants
#     one defended lists it in its own sut_identity_terms. Kept for archival
#     provenance of the original list.
#
# One regex per line; lines starting with # are ignored. Matching is
# case-insensitive; ASCII tokens use word boundaries so generic English
# (e.g. "strongest") does not trip the guard.

# --- ACTIVE: origin-SUT identity terms (regression red line) ---
\bhypervise\b
\bxblock\b
\bmarlon\b
\bxyc2\b
\bscenario_driven\b
\bwalletId\b
\bcrossWithdraw\b
project:hypervise

# --- RETIRED by CHARTER A1 layer 3: industry/domain vocabulary (archived) ---
# \bmnemonic\b
# \beip1559\b
# \bswagger\b
# \btapd\b
# \bvault\b
# \btron\b
# 钱包
